key_observation: Enriched L3 (frob_tau + persistence) on Lorenz improved grounding of Y=1 (in 10-rid diag: mean post-ΔA for Y=1 +0.168 vs Y=0 +0.047, MW p=0.0066). However overall AUC_J07 dropped slightly (0.476 -> 0.458). J0.7 Spearman advantage preserved. Pert response ΔA unchanged at +0.0249. Enriched signal makes labels more selective for strong A-recovery episodes but does not yet make J/J0.7 separate the classes better.
